name: Breadcrumb and back navigation between pages
successCriteria: User can navigate forward through all three pages and back using breadcrumbs without losing orientation

steps.description: Click back breadcrumb to project detail
Click 'All projects' breadcrumb back to dashboard

reviewerNotes: Layer B: H3 (user control and freedom) is the key heuristic — can users navigate freely? Check breadcrumb visibility, link discoverability, and whether the user always knows where they are. Emotional arc should feel 'in control' throughout. Check if header nav is consistent across all pages.
